name: aspect-ratio
title: BTAspectRatio
description: Layout utility atom that constrains its children to a fixed aspect ratio with overflow clipping. Use as a wrapper for images, videos, or any content that must maintain a predictable proportion.

files.content:
export { default as BTAspectRatio } from './BTAspectRatio.vue';
export type { BTAspectRatioProps, BTAspectRatioRatio } from './BTAspectRatio.types';
